description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a Maven cache at /root/.m2/repository and defines stages build-test, code-review, and deploy with MySQL service variables. In the build-test stage add a maven-build-test job using the maven:3-jdk-8 image, runs 'mvn clean package', uses the mysql:5 service, and stores the resulting target/*.jar as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a deploy-heroku job using openjdk:8, installs the Heroku CLI via wget and sh, installs the heroku-cli-deploy plugin, and runs 'heroku deploy:jar target/*.jar --app $CI_PROJECT_NAME' with the HEROKU_API_KEY variable. Also in the deploy stage add a deploy-production job using debian:latest that only runs on branches matching /-RELEASE$/ and executes 'scp target/*.jar root@$SSH_HOSTNAME_PRODUCTION:/var/lib/$CI_PROJECT_NAME/' followed by 'ssh root@$SSH_HOSTNAME_PRODUCTION /var/lib/$CI_PROJECT_NAME/deploy.sh $CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_TAG.jar', relying on a before_script that sets up ssh-agent with $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY and disables strict host checking. Ensure the before_script runs for all jobs.
